data.title: Adagene Posts 2025 Results as Muzastotug Data, Partnerships Extend Cash Runway to 2028
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Adagene ( (ADAG) ) has issued an update.

On April 1, 2026, Adagene reported its full-year 2025 results, highlighting encouraging clinical data for muzastotug plus pembrolizumab in microsatellite stable colorectal cancer, including a 29% confirmed response rate at 20 mg/kg and median overall survival of 19.4 months at 10 mg/kg with favorable tolerability across 67 patients. The company is enrolling ahead of plan in a randomized Phase 2 dose-optimization study that is expected to support a registrational trial, while upcoming AACR 2026 presentations, expanded triplet-combination programs, and collaborations with Sanofi, Roche, Exelixis, and others, alongside $74.5 million in year-end 2025 cash and an extended runway into early 2028, reinforce Adagene’s positioning as a key player in next-generation immuno-oncology combinations.

Adagene’s 2025 financials showed net revenue surging to $7.7 million from $0.1 million a year earlier, driven by collaboration and licensing milestones, while R&D spending fell to $22.0 million and bank borrowings in China were reduced, signaling tighter cost control and reduced leverage. Taken together, the maturing survival data, de-risked dose selection strategy under FDA Project Optimus, robust partnership activity, and strengthened balance sheet suggest a clearer path toward late-stage development of muzastotug and potential value creation for shareholders if forthcoming readouts in 2026–2027 are positive.

The most recent analyst rating on (ADAG) stock is a Buy with a $8.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Adagene stock, see the ADAG Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on ADAG Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ADAG is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by very weak financial performance (sharp revenue decline, large losses, and negative/worsening cash flows). Technicals are a key offset with an established uptrend and positive momentum, while valuation remains constrained by negative earnings and no stated dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on ADAG stock, click here.

More about Adagene

Adagene Inc. is a platform-driven, clinical-stage biotechnology company listed on Nasdaq that focuses on discovering and developing novel antibody-based cancer therapies. The company’s lead asset, muzastotug (ADG126), is a masked anti-CTLA-4 antibody being advanced primarily in microsatellite stable colorectal cancer and hepatocellular carcinoma, supported by its proprietary SAFEbody masking technology and multiple big-pharma collaborations.

Average Trading Volume: 187,429

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $184.8M

For an in-depth examination of ADAG stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.

data.title: Rokmaster Wins Two-Year Drill Permit Extension at Duncan Lake Project
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Rokmaster Resources ( (TSE:RKR) ) has issued an announcement.

Rokmaster Resources has secured a two-year extension to its Multi-year Area Based Exploration Permit for the southern portion of the Duncan Lake Project in southeastern British Columbia, covering the No.3, No.2 and No.1 Zones as well as underexplored ground south of the historic Duncan Mine. The renewed permit allows up to 26 drill sites and 15 trenches, enabling the company to advance multiple drill-ready zinc and silver targets that have already returned strong Zn-Pb-Ag grades from trenching and channel sampling.

The company also holds a separate exploration permit north of the Duncan Mine, where historical and 2022 drilling have intersected the northern extension of the Duncan Anticline with higher zinc-lead-silver grades than those previously seen at the mine. Management views the extended permits and favourable location near a major smelting complex as key to rapidly testing large-scale critical metals targets and potentially enhancing Rokmaster’s position in the zinc and silver exploration space.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:RKR) stock is a Hold with a C$0.07 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Rokmaster Resources stock, see the TSE:RKR Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on RKR Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, RKR is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance (no revenue, ongoing losses/cash burn, and negative equity with rising debt). Technicals are a relative positive with a strong uptrend and positive momentum, but valuation support is limited due to negative earnings and no dividend yield data.

To see Spark’s full report on RKR stock, click here.

More about Rokmaster Resources

Rokmaster Resources is a Canadian mineral exploration company focused on critical metals, primarily zinc, with additional potential for high-grade silver. Its flagship Duncan Lake Project in southeastern British Columbia benefits from extensive road access and proximity to the Trail Smelter, a major zinc and lead smelting and refining complex, supporting future development optionality.

data.title: Black Hawk Acquisition Faces Nasdaq Listing Compliance Challenge
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Black Hawk Acquisition Corporation Class A ( (BKHA) ) has provided an announcement.

On March 31, 2026, Black Hawk Acquisition Corporation disclosed that it had received a notice from Nasdaq indicating the company had failed to meet the $50 million market value of listed securities requirement for the prior 30 consecutive business days, putting its Nasdaq Global Market listing at risk. The company has until September 28, 2026, to regain compliance through a sustained recovery in market value, after which its securities could face delisting, appeal proceedings, or a potential transfer to the Nasdaq Capital Market, although trading in its shares, units, and rights continues uninterrupted in the interim.

More about Black Hawk Acquisition Corporation Class A

Black Hawk Acquisition Corporation is a special purpose acquisition company whose securities, including its Class A ordinary shares, units, and rights, are listed on the Nasdaq Global Market under the symbols BKHA, BKHAU, and BKHAR. As a blank-check company, its primary purpose is to pursue business combinations, with its market value and listing status being key concerns for investors and potential targets.

Average Trading Volume: 3,761

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

See more data about BKHA stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: VolitionRx Shareholders Approve Stock Issuance and Reverse Split
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

VolitionRX ( (VNRX) ) has provided an announcement.

On March 31, 2026, VolitionRx Limited shareholders met in London and approved the issuance of additional common shares exceeding 20% of shares outstanding to Lind Global Asset Management XII LLC, in order to comply with NYSE American listing requirements. At the same special meeting, investors also approved an amendment to authorize a reverse stock split in a ratio between 1-for-5 and 1-for-20, giving the board flexibility to manage the share price and share count, with implications for capital structure, trading liquidity, and continued market listing.

The meeting drew participation from stockholders representing roughly 59% of the company’s outstanding shares, underscoring significant investor engagement in decisions affecting dilution and capital strategy. No other items were brought to a vote, indicating the focus was squarely on securing shareholder backing for key measures that may support VolitionRx’s financing capacity and compliance with exchange rules.

The most recent analyst rating on (VNRX) stock is a Hold with a $0.19 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on VolitionRX stock, see the VNRX Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, VNRX is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance (large losses, persistent cash burn, and negative equity). Technicals also reflect a weak longer-term trend, while valuation offers limited support given negative earnings. Offsetting these factors, the latest earnings call was moderately positive due to partnerships, commercialization progress, and cost control, but uncertainty around revenue timing remains a key risk.

To see Spark’s full report on VNRX stock, click here.

An update from MVB Financial ( (MVBF) ) is now available.

On April 1, 2026, MVB Financial Corp. announced that Michael “Mike” L. Giorgio, Executive Vice President and Chief Information Officer since 2023, was also named Chief Operating Officer, formalizing operational duties he had already assumed. The move underscores how deeply technology is embedded in MVB’s core banking activities, from digital banking and loan platforms to fintech partnerships and deposit operations.

By consolidating technology-dependent functions under Giorgio, who brings more than 20 years’ experience across operations, lending, risk, cybersecurity and fintech, MVB aims to boost execution speed, accountability and operational efficiency. The expanded role is intended to strengthen the bank’s technology-driven operating model and support its competitive positioning as it increasingly operates at the intersection of traditional banking and financial technology.

The bank’s operations span retail and commercial banking, digital banking platforms, lending, deposit operations and enterprise project management. data.title: Cousins Properties Expands Revolving Credit Facility, Extends Maturities
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from Cousins Properties ( (CUZ) ) is now available.

On April 1, 2026, Cousins Properties entered into a Sixth Amended and Restated Credit Agreement, creating a new $1.2 billion senior unsecured revolving credit facility that extends the maturity of its prior line of credit to April 1, 2031. The facility is intended to fund debt repayment, real estate acquisitions, development and renovation projects, and general corporate and working capital needs, and is supported by a broad bank syndicate led by JPMorgan, BofA Securities, Truist Securities, and PNC Capital Markets.

The new credit facility and related agreements impose leverage and coverage covenants and tie interest margins and fees to the company’s debt ratings, with more favorable pricing at stronger ratings and lower leverage ratios. On the same date, Cousins amended two existing term loan agreements to add maturity extensions into 2027 and 2028 and to align their pricing grids with rating-based and leverage-sensitive structures, bolstering liquidity and extending the company’s debt maturity profile.

These changes provide Cousins with increased financial flexibility and greater certainty around long-term funding for its real estate portfolio and development pipeline. They also reinforce the company’s investment-grade capital markets positioning while balancing lender protections through coverage, leverage covenants, and event-of-default provisions.

The most recent analyst rating on (CUZ) stock is a Buy with a $27.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Cousins Properties stock, see the CUZ Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on CUZ Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CUZ is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weakening profitability and inconsistent free cash flow, alongside bearish technical trends. These are partially offset by constructive earnings-call signals (continued FFO growth and strong leasing momentum) and shareholder-friendly capital actions, while valuation remains mixed due to a very high P/E despite an attractive dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on CUZ stock, click here.

More about Cousins Properties

Cousins Properties Incorporated is a real estate company focused on acquiring, developing, renovating, and operating commercial real estate properties. The company utilizes credit facilities and term loans to finance property transactions, manage working capital needs, and support general corporate purposes in its core real estate markets.

The company works with a syndicate of major U.S. and international banks as lenders, agents, and financial service providers. These institutions also engage with Cousins Properties as tenants or joint venture partners, reflecting broad financial and operational relationships that support the firm’s capital structure and growth strategy.

Average Trading Volume: 2,191,705

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $3.79B

data.title: Commercial Vehicle Group Names Interim CFO, Reaffirms 2026 Outlook
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Commercial Vehicle Group ( (CVGI) ) has shared an announcement.

On March 26, 2026, Commercial Vehicle Group announced that Chief Financial Officer Andy Cheung had resigned, effective April 15, 2026, to take a CFO role at another mid‑cap public company, with his unvested equity and benefits expected to be forfeited under existing plans. The company stated his departure did not stem from any disagreement over operations or accounting matters and that he would remain through the effective date to support a smooth transition.

On the same day, CVG promoted Senior Vice President, Corporate Controller and Chief Accounting Officer Angie O’Leary to Interim Chief Financial Officer, effective immediately, while she retains her existing roles and receives a substantial increase in salary, bonus targets, long‑term incentives and change‑in‑control severance. In an April 1, 2026 press release, CVG signaled confidence in its leadership continuity by indicating it does not currently plan to search for another permanent CFO and reaffirmed its previously issued full‑year 2026 financial outlook, suggesting minimal disruption for investors and other stakeholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (CVGI) stock is a Hold with a $4.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Commercial Vehicle Group stock, see the CVGI Stock Forecast page.

data.title: ARMOUR Residential REIT Declares April 2026 Cash Dividends
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

ARMOUR Residential REIT ( (ARR) ) has provided an update.

On March 30, 2026, ARMOUR Residential REIT, Inc. extended the base term of its external management agreement with ARMOUR Capital Management LP by 3.25 years to March 31, 2033, replacing the prior version without changing termination, extension procedures or other key terms. The move signals a long-term commitment to its existing external management structure, providing continuity in investment strategy and operations for investors in its agency mortgage-backed securities portfolio.

On April 1, 2026, ARMOUR confirmed a cash dividend of $0.24 per share on its common stock for April 2026, payable April 29, 2026 to shareholders of record on April 15, 2026. The company also confirmed a monthly cash dividend of $0.14583 per share on its Series C preferred stock for April, May and June 2026, underscoring its ongoing emphasis on regular income distributions as part of its REIT mandate and capital return strategy.

The most recent analyst rating on (ARR) stock is a Hold with a $17.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on ARMOUR Residential REIT stock, see the ARR Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on ARR Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ARR is a Neutral.

ARR scores mid-range: valuation is very attractive (low P/E and high yield) and the earnings call points to improved returns, liquidity, and funding, but the overall score is held back by volatile financial performance across the cycle and weak technical momentum (below key moving averages with negative MACD).

To see Spark’s full report on ARR stock, click here.

More about ARMOUR Residential REIT

ARMOUR Residential REIT, Inc. is a real estate investment trust that invests primarily in fixed-rate, adjustable-rate and hybrid residential mortgage-backed securities issued or guaranteed by U.S. government-sponsored enterprises or guaranteed by Ginnie Mae. The company is externally managed and advised by ARMOUR Capital Management LP, an SEC-registered investment adviser, and focuses on distributing substantially all of its REIT taxable income to shareholders to maintain its tax status.

As a mortgage-focused REIT, ARMOUR’s business model centers on generating income from agency-backed mortgage securities and passing that income through to investors via regular dividends. Its external management structure with ARMOUR Capital Management shapes its capital allocation and risk management decisions, and its dividend policy remains subject to board discretion based on operating performance, liquidity and market conditions.

data.title: CMB.TECH posts strong 2025 results as fleet overhaul and Golden Ocean merger reshape group
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Euronav ( (CMBT) ) is now available.

CMB.TECH NV reported its final results for the year ended 31 December 2025 on 31 March 2026, posting a full-year profit of USD 139.1 million after a strong fourth quarter and growing revenue to USD 1.67 billion. The company expanded its contract backlog to USD 3.05 billion and booked capital gains of USD 192.6 million on 2025 vessel sales, with about USD 269.3 million of additional gains expected from first-quarter 2026 disposals.

Operationally, CMB.TECH accelerated a major fleet rejuvenation in 2025 with 17 newbuild deliveries, orders for nine additional vessels and the sale of 12 older ships, while signing landmark agreements with Fortescue and MOL for ammonia-powered vessels that support its decarbonisation positioning. Strategically, it completed the acquisition and merger of Golden Ocean, secured triple listings on NYSE, Euronext Brussels and Euronext Oslo, invested in the Chinese ammonia supply chain and continued to rebalance its portfolio in early 2026 through the sale of a Tankers International Pool stake, disposal of further VLCCs and Capesize vessels, and governance changes on its management and supervisory boards.

The most recent analyst rating on (CMBT) stock is a Buy with a EUR15.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Euronav stock, see the CMBT Stock Forecast page.

More about Euronav

CMB.TECH NV is a Belgium-based shipping and maritime technology company listed in New York, Brussels and Oslo under the ticker CMBT. The group operates a diversified fleet including bulk carriers, crude and chemical tankers, crew transfer vessels and construction support vessels, and is increasingly focused on alternative-fuel and ammonia-powered ships as well as investments in related supply chains, notably in China.

Average Trading Volume: 260,748

Current Market Cap: €3.17B
